name: Peach and Dijon Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon whole grain or dijon mustard
1/4 cup sour cream, non-fat works OK
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the egg whites to a blender or food processor.
2. Mix in the seasoned rice vinegar, peach preserves, minced garlic, and whole grain or dijon mustard.
3. Pour in the sour cream and lemon juice.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Slowly add olive oil while continuing to blend, gradually increasing the speed of the addition until the dressing reaches a thick consistency.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
